evals.name: glob-input-basic
evals.expected_output: Parse glob pattern, validate plans, confirm with user before starting batch

assertions.name: glob-expansion
assertions.description: Correctly expands glob pattern to list of plan files
assertions.check: Glob tool or equivalent used to expand plans/feat-*.md

assertions.name: preflight-validation
assertions.description: Runs preflight validation on expanded paths
assertions.check: arc-batch-preflight.sh invoked or validation logic executed

assertions.name: user-confirmation
assertions.description: Asks user to confirm batch before starting
assertions.check: AskUserQuestion called with batch confirmation options

evals.name: queue-file-input
evals.expected_output: Read queue file, parse plan paths, maintain order, confirm batch

assertions.name: queue-file-read
assertions.description: Reads and parses the .txt queue file
assertions.check: Read tool used on batch-queue.txt, lines filtered for non-empty non-comment

assertions.name: order-preserved
assertions.description: Queue file order is preserved by default (no smart sorting without flag)
assertions.check: Phase 1.5 skip logic triggered for queue input type

assertions.name: input-type-detected
assertions.description: Correctly identifies inputType as 'queue'
assertions.check: Args endswith .txt triggers queue input path

evals.name: dry-run-preview
evals.prompt: Preview batch arc for plans/*.md without running
evals.expected_output: Show plan list and time estimate, exit without starting batch

assertions.name: dry-run-flag-detected
assertions.description: Detects --dry-run flag in arguments
assertions.check: dryRun boolean set from args.includes('--dry-run') or similar

assertions.name: plan-list-output
assertions.description: Outputs list of plans that would be processed
assertions.check: Plans enumerated with numbering or bullet list

assertions.name: time-estimate
assertions.description: Shows time estimate (45-240 min per plan)
assertions.check: Estimate range shown based on plan count

assertions.name: no-state-file
assertions.description: Does not write state file in dry-run mode
assertions.check: Early return before Phase 3/5 state file creation

evals.name: resume-crashed-session
evals.expected_output: Read progress file, reset stale in_progress plans, continue with remaining plans

assertions.name: resume-mode-detected
assertions.description: Detects --resume flag and sets inputType to 'resume'
assertions.check: resumeMode from args.includes('--resume'), inputType set to 'resume'

assertions.name: progress-file-read
assertions.description: Reads batch-progress.json for existing state
assertions.check: Read tool used on tmp/arc-batch/batch-progress.json

assertions.name: stale-in-progress-reset
assertions.description: Resets in_progress plans from crashed session to pending
assertions.check: Plans with status 'in_progress' changed to 'pending'

assertions.name: filter-pending-only
assertions.description: Only resumes pending plans, skips completed
assertions.check: planPaths filtered to status === 'pending' only

evals.name: smart-ordering-isolated-first
evals.prompt: Run batch arc on plans/*.md with smart ordering
evals.expected_output: Reorder plans so isolated plans (no file overlap) run first, then by version_target

assertions.name: smart-sort-triggered
assertions.description: Smart ordering is activated (--smart-sort or input-type heuristic)
assertions.check: Phase 1.5 logic executes, smartOrderPlans() called or equivalent

assertions.name: file-target-extraction
assertions.description: Extracts file targets from each plan
assertions.check: YAML frontmatter scope/files_modified parsed, or backtick paths extracted

assertions.name: overlap-detection
assertions.description: Detects file overlap between plans (excluding universal files)
assertions.check: intersect() check or equivalent overlap logic executed

assertions.name: isolated-first-sort
assertions.description: Sorts isolated plans before conflicting plans
assertions.check: is_isolated DESC in sort comparator

assertions.name: version-target-sort
assertions.description: Within same isolation class, sorts by version_target ASC
assertions.check: version_target ASC in sort comparator, nulls last

evals.name: shard-grouping-detection
evals.prompt: Run batch arc on plans/feat-auth-*.md plans/feat-user-*.md
evals.expected_output: Detect shard patterns (1of3, 2of3, etc.), group by feature, sort by shard number

assertions.name: shard-pattern-detected
assertions.description: Detects shard naming pattern in plan filenames
assertions.check: Regex matching for -([0-9]+)of([0-9]+) or similar shard pattern

assertions.name: feature-grouping
assertions.description: Groups shards by feature prefix
assertions.check: Map or object keyed by feature prefix (feat-auth, feat-user)

assertions.name: numeric-ordering
assertions.description: Sorts shards within groups by shard number
assertions.check: Shards sorted 1of3, 2of3, 3of3 within each feature group

assertions.name: parent-exclusion
assertions.description: Excludes parent plans with shattered: true from execution
assertions.check: Plans with shattered: true filtered out of execution list

assertions.name: conflict-detected
assertions.description: Detects both --smart-sort and --no-smart-sort in arguments
assertions.check: forceSmartSort && noSmartSort condition checked

assertions.name: warning-issued
assertions.description: Warns user about conflicting flags
assertions.check: Warning message logged or shown to user

assertions.name: no-smart-sort-wins
assertions.description: Uses --no-smart-sort as winner (fail-safe)
assertions.check: forceSmartSort set to false, no smart ordering applied

evals.name: empty-glob-error
evals.expected_output: Error message about no plan files found

assertions.name: glob-returns-empty
assertions.description: Glob expansion returns empty array
assertions.check: Glob tool returns [] or empty result

assertions.name: error-message
assertions.description: Shows error message about no plan files found
assertions.check: Error output includes 'No plan files found' or similar

assertions.name: early-return
assertions.description: Returns early without creating state files
assertions.check: Function returns before Phase 3 progress file creation

evals.name: progress-file-initialization
evals.prompt: Start batch arc for plans/feat-a.md plans/feat-b.md
evals.expected_output: Create batch-progress.json with correct schema v2 structure

assertions.name: progress-file-created
assertions.description: Creates tmp/arc-batch/batch-progress.json
assertions.check: Write tool used on tmp/arc-batch/batch-progress.json

assertions.name: schema-version
assertions.description: Uses schema_version 2
assertions.check: JSON includes schema_version: 2

assertions.name: plan-statuses
assertions.description: All plans initialized with status 'pending'
assertions.check: Each plan in plans array has status: 'pending'

assertions.name: timestamps
assertions.description: Includes started_at and updated_at timestamps
assertions.check: ISO-8601 timestamps present in progress file

assertions.name: total-count
assertions.description: total_plans matches actual plan count
assertions.check: total_plans field equals length of plans array

evals.name: state-file-session-isolation
evals.expected_output: State file includes config_dir and owner_pid for session isolation

assertions.name: state-file-created
assertions.description: Creates .claude/arc-batch-loop.local.md state file
assertions.check: Write tool used on .claude/arc-batch-loop.local.md

assertions.name: config-dir-field
assertions.description: State file includes config_dir field
assertions.check: YAML frontmatter includes config_dir

assertions.name: owner-pid-field
assertions.description: State file includes owner_pid field
assertions.check: YAML frontmatter includes owner_pid

assertions.name: session-id-field
assertions.description: State file includes session_id field
assertions.check: YAML frontmatter includes session_id

evals.name: no-merge-flag
evals.expected_output: Pass --no-merge to each arc run, skip auto-merge step

assertions.name: flag-detected
assertions.description: Detects --no-merge flag
assertions.check: noMerge set from args.includes('--no-merge')

assertions.name: skip-merge-check
assertions.description: Skips auto-merge talisman check when flag present
assertions.check: !noMerge condition gates talisman auto_merge check

assertions.name: flag-propagated
assertions.description: Flag passed to arc invocation
assertions.check: --no-merge included in Skill('rune:arc', ...) call

evals.name: talisman-auto-merge-disabled
evals.prompt: Start batch arc for plans/*.md (with talisman arc.ship.auto_merge: false)
evals.expected_output: Prompt user about disabled auto-merge, offer options

assertions.name: talisman-check
assertions.description: Reads arc.ship.auto_merge from talisman
assertions.check: readTalismanSection('arc') called, ship.auto_merge checked

assertions.name: user-prompt
assertions.description: Asks user how to proceed with disabled auto-merge
assertions.check: AskUserQuestion with options for enabling, --no-merge, or abort

assertions.name: skip-if-flag
assertions.description: Skips check when --no-merge already set
assertions.check: Condition gated by !noMerge
